name: Desser Miveh (Persian Fruit Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried figs, chopped; or apricot
recipeInstructions: Here is a Sephardic Tu B'Shevat recipe from "Sephardic Holiday Cooking" by Gilda Angel. Place the fruit in a serving bowl. Pour the orange juice over the fruit and mix gently. Garnish with almonds or coconut. Cover and chill several hours before serving. ENJOY!
